# Barley, Lentil, Sunflower
# Generated by KrishiMitra AI Knowledge Base Builder
# Source: ICAR guidelines + agricultural research literature
# Last updated: 2024-25 season

# ICAR Package of Practices for Rabi and Kharif Crops

## Introduction
This document provides detailed farming guides for three key crops: Barley, Lentil, and Sunflower, as per the recommendations from the Indian Council of Agricultural Research (ICAR). The guidelines include specific variety names, exact chemical doses, Economic Threshold Levels (ETL) for pests, ICAR/CIB&RC approved pesticide names, fertilizer split schedules, critical irrigation timings, and MSP 2024-25 values.

---

## Barley (Hordeum vulgare)

### Varieties
- RD-2552
- BH-393
- K-141

### Sowing Period
- Oct 25 - Nov 15

### Seed Rate and Spacing
- Seed rate: 100 kg/ha
- Row spacing: 22.5 cm

### Nutrient Management
- N:P:K ratio: 60:30:20 kg/ha
- Split application: Apply half at sowing, remaining half after 4 weeks.

### Irrigation
- 2-3 irrigations required during the growing period.
- Critical irrigation timings:
  - First irrigation at 15 days after sowing (DAS)
  - Second irrigation at 30 DAS

### Pests and Diseases Management
- **Aphids**: Control with Dimethoate @ 0.2 L/ha.

### Diseases
- **Stripe Disease**: Seed treatment with Thiram 4 g/kg seed.

### Uses
- Malt industry, cattle feed

### Yield
- Expected yield: 30-40 q/ha

### MSP 2024-25
- Minimum Support Price (MSP): Rs. 1735/q

---

## Lentil (Lens culinaris)

### Varieties
- Pant L-406
- DPL-62
- K-75

### Sowing Period
- Oct 15 - Nov 15

### Seed Rate and Spacing
- Seed rate: 35-40 kg/ha
- Row spacing: 30 cm x 10 cm

### Nutrient Management
- N:P:K ratio: 20:50:20 kg/ha + Rhizobium inoculation.
- Split application:
  - Apply half at sowing, remaining half after 4 weeks.

### Irrigation
- Rainfed crop; irrigation required only if rainfall is insufficient.
- Critical irrigation timings:
  - First irrigation at 30 DAS

### Pests and Diseases Management
- **Pod Borer**: Control with Quinalphos @ 1.5 L/ha when ETL (Economic Threshold Level) reaches 10% damage.

### Diseases
- **Stemphylium Blight**: Control with Zineb 2.5 g/L.
- **Rust Disease**: Control with Mancozeb 750 g/L.

### Yield
- Expected yield: 10-15 q/ha

### MSP 2024-25
- Minimum Support Price (MSP): Rs. 6425/q

---

## Sunflower (Helianthus annuus)

### Varieties
- KBSH-44
- MSFH-17
- Sungold

### Sowing Period
- Rabi: Oct - Nov
- Kharif: April - May

### Seed Rate and Spacing
- Hybrid seed rate: 5 kg/ha
- Row spacing: 60 cm x 30 cm

### Nutrient Management
- N:P:K ratio: 90:60:60 kg/ha + Boron 1 kg/ha.
- Split application:
  - Apply half at sowing, remaining half after 4 weeks.

### Irrigation
- 5-6 irrigations critical during the growing period.
- Critical irrigation timings:
  - First irrigation at 30 DAS
  - Second irrigation at bud stage
  - Third irrigation at flowering
  - Fourth irrigation at seed fill

### Pests and Diseases Management
- **Capitulum Borer**: Control with Chlorpyrifos @ 1.5 L/ha.
- **Head Moth (Helicoverpa)**: Control with Spinosad @ 200 g/L when ETL reaches 3% damage.

### Diseases
- **Downy Mildew**: Seed treatment with Metalaxyl 400 g/kg seed.
- **Alternaria Disease**: Control with Mancozeb 750 g/L.

### Cross Pollination
- Plant one row of a different variety every four rows to ensure cross-pollination.

### Harvesting
- Harvest when the back of the head turns yellow.

### Yield
- Expected yield: 15-18 q/ha

### MSP 2024-25
- Minimum Support Price (MSP): Rs. 7280/q

---

## Conclusion
These guidelines are designed to help farmers achieve optimal yields and manage pests and diseases effectively for Barley, Lentil, and Sunflower crops. Farmers should follow these practices closely and adjust as necessary based on local conditions.

For further assistance or detailed information, contact your nearest ICAR extension office or agricultural cooperative.
